steps.title: Use the target-expression shortcut
steps.content: The target $6x-1$ is close to $\left(3\right)(2x+3)$. Multiply the given equation $2x+3=9$ by $3$: $$6x+9=27.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The requested value is 17. This method is faster than solving for $x$ because it transforms the given equation directly into the expression the question asks for.
